TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tafokod Tafokod hananay o tayal no fahinay kapah no pangcah mafanaay a tyra i talawadaw ato riyar a mifoting, halikaen to pangcah tona foting, saka mido'do to mato'asay a minocos mateneay a demak. Ano mangta to ilisin i, fafahinay a tayal konini tayra i aloaloan mifoting, sakaen no po:long a niyaroen. Itira:ho o orip no sapangcahay i, o minocos to mahaanay a demak, cacay ka tawalen ko mahaanay a demk, o fafahinay tyra i talawadaw mi konglen, sasifanay no mama no kapah mahanaay a demak. Pi'arawan to lakaw Sowal no mama fuya na i koyo a niyaro a tamdaw O nikafana' no Pangcah/Amis to tafokod ato no lekakawa a pifoting: Faco no masaPangcahay/masaAmisay, fana' no seraserayan, ato no lekakawa a pala Sakacecay: Siwkay Itini i no Taywan a finacadan i, o Pangcah/ Amis ko finacadan no riyar, kacinganganan i matasimay a selal, misa'alingayay no ina ato sakacifana' to riyar ato tarawadaw. Itini to i pasawali laeno no lotok mililisay to riyar ato i satimolan no Tayawan ato i masadafdaf no Kalingko ato Posong ko masaPangcahay/masaAmisay, mikiriyar ato mikitarawadaw a ma'orip, matenetenesay a misoped to fana' no leno^ ato kerah, ato rakat no foting. O tatapangan a sapifoting no kapah ko tafokod, o nipifolesak ato nipisolimet tona tafokod i, o pipatodongan to nikapalada' to dafong no niyaro' ato nikarikec no finawlan. O lekakawa no pifoting no Pangcah/Amis i, matae'elifay to saka'orip no finawlan, macakat ko pipadoedoan to lekakawa, tatayalan no kapolongan ato sakati'er to kawas. O tatapangan nonini a pikadkad i, pakayni i tatayalan no niyaro' ato masasipadang no finawlan a mipahapinang to lekakawa no pifoting, to nikapadefong to saka'orip no Pangcah, piilisinan a kaitiraan ato fana' to seraserayan. Sakatosa: O nikalalen no tayalan no kapah ato limecelan i faco no finawlan mahapinang ko lekakawa no pifoting to tafokod, o nika o fa'inayan ko mikeriday to selal to mifoting, saka mikadakad to rayray no masaPangcah/masaAmisay. O masatosaay ko lalan no masaPangcahay/masaAmisay: O no fafahiyan ko mikeriday to ngasaw ato midotoc to dafong, o no fa'inayan a kasaselal ko mikeriday to tatayalan no kapolongan. O kasaselal no niyaro' i, misasa'er to fa'inayan nani pakarongay tangasa i kalas a misasilsil. O matayalay to tatayalan i 'ayaway ko kapah, o mamacakatay ko ma'ikesay a kapah to mama no kapah ato cinganganay a kalas, mata'eliay to pinapina a mihecaan i, ta misaselal to, saka masarikecay ko kasaselal. Sapipa'oripaw ato sapipasimawaw ko masaPngcah/masaAmisay to niyaro', mapatireng ko sakacirikec no kasaselal, masasiketay to misa'alingayay no ina a lekakawa, saka masatosaay ko lalan no lekakawa no masaPangcah/masaAmisay. O matiniay a lekakawa 'i, o sapipalalen to ci'icelay a fafahiyan i misa'alingayay no ina a lekakawa, o sapipacakat to fa'inayan pakayni i pi'emet to demak no niyaro', ta mapatireng ko tata'angay a ngangan. Saka i tarawadaw ato riyal a mifoting ko tafokod, mipatomecekan to tatayalan no kapolongan no fa'inayan ato lekakawa. Citodong a mipolita to rakat no nanom ato kaitiraan no fotifotingan, o matiniay a taneng i, saheto o i tatihi no mato'asay a minanam to pinapina a mihecaan, ta maala ko matiniay a taneng, saka o kananaman no mitafokod i, to pipahapinang to cingangan ato nikafana' no fa'inayan i niyaro'. Sakatolo: O lalosidan no lekakawa ato fana' to sapisanga' ko kasasiikeiked no fafahiyan ato fa'inayan O lalosidan no lekakawa no masaPangcah/masaAmisay i, midoedo to lekakawa no fafahiyan ato fa'inayan, sakacaay kasawad to lekakawa no niyaro' ato sapatanetek to rikec no niyaro. O misakoreng ato misalosid(o teked no fafahiyan): O fafahiyan ko citodongay a misakoreng, misanga' to sapitangtang ato sapisalisin a kasasiromaroma a lalosidan. O misatorik ato sapirepet to foting( o teked no malitengay a fa'inyan): Tadamaanay ko fana' to misatirik to lalosidan, saheto o malitengay ko citodongay, misanga' to fakar, rakar ato masamaamaanay a sapirepet to foting. Oni a kasasiiked no tatayalan i, masapadapadangay ko kapah a mifolesak to tafokod i 'ayaw ato malitengay a misanga' to sapirepet to foting i ikol, saka maliteng to ko tireng no malitengay i, pado'edo ho o tatapangan no mipalowaday to tayal. O nikalariting no lisin to misaloma' ato piforting: Ira ko matalolongay a kalalitilitingan no lisin i misaloma' i pala ato pifotimg i 'alo. Tinako sa, o lekakawa no to'as i, malepon to ko pafafoyan i tihi no loma' i, cakaeca tayra i 'alo a mifoting ko fa'inayan, o sapisalisin a mipakelang to nikaleponan. O matiniay a lekakawa i, pahapinang to pinang no Pangcah/ Amis, o pifoting hananay i, caay ko piala aca to kinaia a nanam, o nikalaliting no lisin to lekakawa no dademakan, pafalien ko nikarorayan a lisin, caay ko sakapafecol to tiyad aca. O misacepo' i: O nikapahapinang to lekakawa no kasaselal i demak. O misacepo' hananay a lisin i, itiniay i sakalima a folad tangasa i sakafalo a folad to midemak, o sapalemed, o sapirikec ato o sapipalaliting to tamdaw, ato pipatomecek to 'icel no kasaselal. Caay pacefa a miketon to lisin a romi'ad, o mitooray to palapatan, tinako sa , itini i sakalima a folad, ira ko fakici, kakaho ato fowa a masadak, matatodongay ko pifoting a romi'an, saka malalitin ko lisin ato seraserayan. Itini i misacepo' no masaPangcahay/masaAmisay i, o kasasiiked no tatayalen ato pisalilam to kinaira i, mipahapinang to micidekay a lekakawa no nikalaliting no tamdamdaw. O matiniay caay kahecad a kasasiiked i, o sapilifeten to pidoedo no kapah ato pingodo to malitengay. Nikaorira, o 'osaw no malitengay a foting i, mipahofi to ciicelay a selal ato pakalongay a pakahemek. Oni a pisalilam to kinaira i, mipalafangcal to nikalaliting no kasaselal, saka mala tadamicidekay a lisin ko misacepo' no Pangcah/Amis. O pipalada' no malitengay i, o sapipahemak ato sapipaini a sowal, saka caay ko nikalaan to foting aca ko nipafelian, o pakahemek aca to kasenngan i 'ayaw no alomanay. Oni a pakahemak hananay i, o nipinengnegnan no Pangcah/Amis to kasengan no kasaselal i, ira ko sapicoker, sapipa'icel to faloco', saka pakaolah to nikarotengan a selal a parayray. Saikolay O lekakawa no pifoting no Pangcah/Amis to tafokod i, o masasifoday a nikarariting no finawalan ato seraserayan. Pakayni i tarawadaw ato riyal ato i pala a midateng a fana' i, mapatireng no Pangcah/Amis ko teked to kakaenen. Itini i pikinengneng no aniniay, mikadakd to kalimelaan a fana' no malitengay to pifoting, pakayni i picoker to serangawa ato padoedo a pidipot to seraserayan i, ma'emin ira ko satadamaanay a 'epoc no pikingkiw ato pipademak. Saka o nikafana' no Pangcah/Amis to tafokod i, caay ko taneng aca no pifoting, o nikalaliting to finawlan ato seraserayan a mipatireng to masasipadang a pinangan. Oni a harateng i, o tadakalimelaay a harateng.

…ĺisin i, itiniaj i saka…ĺima a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ taŇčasa i sakafa…ĺo~u a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u mi…¨~…ģ…ômak, o~u sapa…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ, o~u sapirik…ô ¶ ato~u o~u sapipa…ĺa…ĺitiŇč to~u tam…¨~…ģaw, ato~u pipato~um…ô ¶…ôk to~u °i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ. ¶aaj pa ¶…ôfa a mik…ôto~un to~u …ĺisin a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u mito~uo~uraj to~u pa…ĺapatan, tinako~u sa , itini i saka…ĺima a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ira ko~u faki ¶i, kakańßo~u ato~u fo~uwa a masa…¨~…ģak, matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj ko~u pifo~utiŇč a ro~umi °an, saka ma…ĺa…ĺitin ko~u …ĺisin ato~u s…ôras…ôrajan. itini i misa ¶…ôpo~u ° no~u masapaŇč ¶ańßaj/masaamisaj i, o~u kasasiik…ô…¨~…ģ no~u tataja…ĺ…ôn ato~u pisa…ĺi…ĺam to~u kinaira i, mipańßapinaŇč to~u mi ¶i…¨~…ģ…ôkaj a …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u nika…ĺa…ĺitiŇč no~u tam…¨~…ģam…¨~…ģaw. o~u matiniaj ¶aaj kańß…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ a kasasiik…ô…¨~…ģ i, o~u sapi…ĺif…ôt…ôn to~u pi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u no~u kapańß ato~u piŇčo~u…¨~…ģo~u to~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj. nikao~urira, o~u °o~usaw no~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj a fo~utiŇč i, mipańßo~ufi to~u ¶ii ¶…ô…ĺaj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ ato~u paka…ĺo~uŇčaj a pakańß…ôm…ôk. o~uni a pisa…ĺi…ĺam to~u kinaira i, mipa…ĺafaŇč ¶a…ĺ to~u nika…ĺa…ĺitiŇč no~u kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ, saka ma…ĺa ta…¨~…ģami ¶i…¨~…ģ…ôkaj a …ĺisin ko~u misa ¶…ôpo~u ° no~u paŇč ¶ańß/amis. o~u pipa…ĺa…¨~…ģa ° no~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj i, o~u sapipańß…ômak ato~u sapipaini a so~uwa…ĺ, saka ¶aaj ko~u nika…ĺaan to~u fo~utiŇč a ¶a ko~u nipaf…ô…ĺian, o~u pakańß…ôm…ôk a ¶a to~u kas…ônŇčan i °ajaw no~u a…ĺo~umanaj. o~uni a pakańß…ômak ńßananaj i, o~u nipin…ôŇčn…ô*nan no~u paŇč ¶ańß/amis to~u kas…ôŇčan no~u kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ i, ira ko~u sapi ¶o~uk…ôr, sapipa °i ¶…ô…ĺ to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, saka pakao~u…ĺańß to~u nikaro~ut…ôŇčan a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ a parajraj. saiko~u…ĺaj o~u …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u pifo~utiŇč no~u paŇč ¶ańß/amis to~u tafo~uko~u…¨~…ģ i, o~u masasifo~u…¨~…ģaj a nikararitiŇč no~u finawa…ĺan ato~u s…ôras…ôrajan. pakajni i tarawa…¨~…ģaw ato~u rija…ĺ ato~u i pa…ĺa a mi…¨~…ģat…ôŇč a fana ° i, mapatir…ôŇč no~u paŇč ¶ańß/amis ko~u t…ôk…ô…¨~…ģ to~u kaka…ôn…ôn. itini i pikin…ôŇčn…ôŇč no~u aniniaj, mika…¨~…ģak…¨~…ģ to~u ka…ĺim…ô…ĺaan a fana ° no~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj to~u pifo~utiŇč, pakajni i pi ¶o~uk…ôr to~u s…ôraŇčawa ato~u pa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u a pi…¨~…ģipo~ut to~u s…ôras…ôrajan i, ma °…ômin ira ko~u sata…¨~…ģamaanaj a °…ôpo~u ¶ no~u pikiŇčkiw ato~u pipa…¨~…ģ…ômak. saka o~u nikafana ° no~u paŇč ¶ańß/amis to~u tafo~uko~u…¨~…ģ i, ¶aaj ko~u tan…ôŇč a ¶a no~u pifo~utiŇč, o~u nika…ĺa…ĺitiŇč to~u finaw…ĺan ato~u s…ôras…ôrajan a mipatir…ôŇč to~u masasipa…¨~…ģaŇč a pinaŇčan. o~uni a ńßarat…ôŇč i, o~u ta…¨~…ģaka…ĺim…ô…ĺaaj a ńßarat…ôŇč.
S.FORM: tafokod Tafokod hananay o tayal no fahinay kapah no pangcah mafanaay a tyra i talawadaw ato riyar a mifoting, halikaen to pangcah tona foting, saka mido'do to mato'asay a minocos mateneay a demak. Ano mangta to ilisin i, fafahinay a tayal konini tayra i aloaloan mifoting, sakaen no po:long a niyaroen. Itira:ho o orip no sapangcahay i, o minocos to mahaanay a demak, cacay ka tawalen ko mahaanay a demk, o fafahinay tyra i talawadaw mi konglen, sasifanay no mama no kapah mahanaay a demak. Pi'arawan to lakaw Sowal no mama fuya na i koyo a niyaro a tamdaw O nikafana' no Pangcah/Amis to tafokod ato no lekakawa a pifoting: Faco no masaPangcahay/masaAmisay, fana' no seraserayan, ato no lekakawa a pala Sakacecay: Siwkay Itini i no Taywan a finacadan i, o Pangcah/ Amis ko finacadan no riyar, kacinganganan i matasimay a selal, misa'alingayay no ina ato sakacifana' to riyar ato tarawadaw. Itini to i pasawali laeno no lotok mililisay to riyar ato i satimolan no Tayawan ato i masadafdaf no Kalingko ato Posong ko masaPangcahay/masaAmisay, mikiriyar ato mikitarawadaw a ma'orip, matenetenesay a misoped to fana' no leno^ ato kerah, ato rakat no foting. O tatapangan a sapifoting no kapah ko tafokod, o nipifolesak ato nipisolimet tona tafokod i, o pipatodongan to nikapalada' to dafong no niyaro' ato nikarikec no finawlan. O lekakawa no pifoting no Pangcah/Amis i, matae'elifay to saka'orip no finawlan, macakat ko pipadoedoan to lekakawa, tatayalan no kapolongan ato sakati'er to kawas. O tatapangan nonini a pikadkad i, pakayni i tatayalan no niyaro' ato masasipadang no finawlan a mipahapinang to lekakawa no pifoting, to nikapadefong to saka'orip no Pangcah, piilisinan a kaitiraan ato fana' to seraserayan. Sakatosa: O nikalalen no tayalan no kapah ato limecelan i faco no finawlan mahapinang ko lekakawa no pifoting to tafokod, o nika o fa'inayan ko mikeriday to selal to mifoting, saka mikadakad to rayray no masaPangcah/masaAmisay. O masatosaay ko lalan no masaPangcahay/masaAmisay: O no fafahiyan ko mikeriday to ngasaw ato midotoc to dafong, o no fa'inayan a kasaselal ko mikeriday to tatayalan no kapolongan. O kasaselal no niyaro' i, misasa'er to fa'inayan nani pakarongay tangasa i kalas a misasilsil. O matayalay to tatayalan i 'ayaway ko kapah, o mamacakatay ko ma'ikesay a kapah to mama no kapah ato cinganganay a kalas, mata'eliay to pinapina a mihecaan i, ta misaselal to, saka masarikecay ko kasaselal. Sapipa'oripaw ato sapipasimawaw ko masaPngcah/masaAmisay to niyaro', mapatireng ko sakacirikec no kasaselal, masasiketay to misa'alingayay no ina a lekakawa, saka masatosaay ko lalan no lekakawa no masaPangcah/masaAmisay. O matiniay a lekakawa 'i, o sapipalalen to ci'icelay a fafahiyan i misa'alingayay no ina a lekakawa, o sapipacakat to fa'inayan pakayni i pi'emet to demak no niyaro', ta mapatireng ko tata'angay a ngangan. Saka i tarawadaw ato riyal a mifoting ko tafokod, mipatomecekan to tatayalan no kapolongan no fa'inayan ato lekakawa. Citodong a mipolita to rakat no nanom ato kaitiraan no fotifotingan, o matiniay a taneng i, saheto o i tatihi no mato'asay a minanam to pinapina a mihecaan, ta maala ko matiniay a taneng, saka o kananaman no mitafokod i, to pipahapinang to cingangan ato nikafana' no fa'inayan i niyaro'. Sakatolo: O lalosidan no lekakawa ato fana' to sapisanga' ko kasasiikeiked no fafahiyan ato fa'inayan O lalosidan no lekakawa no masaPangcah/masaAmisay i, midoedo to lekakawa no fafahiyan ato fa'inayan, sakacaay kasawad to lekakawa no niyaro' ato sapatanetek to rikec no niyaro. O misakoreng ato misalosid(o teked no fafahiyan): O fafahiyan ko citodongay a misakoreng, misanga' to sapitangtang ato sapisalisin a kasasiromaroma a lalosidan. O misatorik ato sapirepet to foting( o teked no malitengay a fa'inyan): Tadamaanay ko fana' to misatirik to lalosidan, saheto o malitengay ko citodongay, misanga' to fakar, rakar ato masamaamaanay a sapirepet to foting. Oni a kasasiiked no tatayalan i, masapadapadangay ko kapah a mifolesak to tafokod i 'ayaw ato malitengay a misanga' to sapirepet to foting i ikol, saka maliteng to ko tireng no malitengay i, pado'edo ho o tatapangan no mipalowaday to tayal. O nikalariting no lisin to misaloma' ato piforting: Ira ko matalolongay a kalalitilitingan no lisin i misaloma' i pala ato pifotimg i 'alo. Tinako sa, o lekakawa no to'as i, malepon to ko pafafoyan i tihi no loma' i, cakaeca tayra i 'alo a mifoting ko fa'inayan, o sapisalisin a mipakelang to nikaleponan. O matiniay a lekakawa i, pahapinang to pinang no Pangcah/ Amis, o pifoting hananay i, caay ko piala aca to kinaia a nanam, o nikalaliting no lisin to lekakawa no dademakan, pafalien ko nikarorayan a lisin, caay ko sakapafecol to tiyad aca. O misacepo' i: O nikapahapinang to lekakawa no kasaselal i demak. O misacepo' hananay a lisin i, itiniay i sakalima a folad tangasa i sakafalo a folad to midemak, o sapalemed, o sapirikec ato o sapipalaliting to tamdaw, ato pipatomecek to 'icel no kasaselal. Caay pacefa a miketon to lisin a romi'ad, o mitooray to palapatan, tinako sa , itini i sakalima a folad, ira ko fakici, kakaho ato fowa a masadak, matatodongay ko pifoting a romi'an, saka malalitin ko lisin ato seraserayan. Itini i misacepo' no masaPangcahay/masaAmisay i, o kasasiiked no tatayalen ato pisalilam to kinaira i, mipahapinang to micidekay a lekakawa no nikalaliting no tamdamdaw. O matiniay caay kahecad a kasasiiked i, o sapilifeten to pidoedo no kapah ato pingodo to malitengay. Nikaorira, o 'osaw no malitengay a foting i, mipahofi to ciicelay a selal ato pakalongay a pakahemek. Oni a pisalilam to kinaira i, mipalafangcal to nikalaliting no kasaselal, saka mala tadamicidekay a lisin ko misacepo' no Pangcah/Amis. O pipalada' no malitengay i, o sapipahemak ato sapipaini a sowal, saka caay ko nikalaan to foting aca ko nipafelian, o pakahemek aca to kasenngan i 'ayaw no alomanay. Oni a pakahemak hananay i, o nipinengnegnan no Pangcah/Amis to kasengan no kasaselal i, ira ko sapicoker, sapipa'icel to faloco', saka pakaolah to nikarotengan a selal a parayray. Saikolay O lekakawa no pifoting no Pangcah/Amis to tafokod i, o masasifoday a nikarariting no finawalan ato seraserayan. Pakayni i tarawadaw ato riyal ato i pala a midateng a fana' i, mapatireng no Pangcah/Amis ko teked to kakaenen. Itini i pikinengneng no aniniay, mikadakd to kalimelaan a fana' no malitengay to pifoting, pakayni i picoker to serangawa ato padoedo a pidipot to seraserayan i, ma'emin ira ko satadamaanay a 'epoc no pikingkiw ato pipademak. Saka o nikafana' no Pangcah/Amis to tafokod i, caay ko taneng aca no pifoting, o nikalaliting to finawlan ato seraserayan a mipatireng to masasipadang a pinangan. Oni a harateng i, o tadakalimelaay a harateng.
S.PHON: tafo~uko~u…¨~…ģ tafo~uko~u…¨~…ģ ńßananaj o~u taja…ĺ no~u fańßinaj kapańß no~u paŇč ¶ańß mafanaaj a tjra i ta…ĺawa…¨~…ģaw ato~u rijar a mifo~utiŇč, ńßa…ĺika…ôn to~u paŇč ¶ańß to~una fo~utiŇč, saka mi…¨~…ģo~u °…¨~…ģo~u to~u mato~u °asaj a mino~u ¶o~us mat…ôn…ôaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak. ano~u maŇčta to~u i…ĺisin i, fafańßinaj a taja…ĺ ko~unini tajra i a…ĺo~ua…ĺo~uan mifo~utiŇč, saka…ôn no~u po~u:…ĺo~uŇč a nijaro~u…ôn. itira:ńßo~u o~u o~urip no~u sapaŇč ¶ańßaj i, o~u mino~u ¶o~us to~u mańßaanaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, ¶a ¶aj ka tawa…ĺ…ôn ko~u mańßaanaj a …¨~…ģ…ômk, o~u fafańßinaj tjra i ta…ĺawa…¨~…ģaw mi ko~uŇč…ĺ…ôn, sasifanaj no~u mama no~u kapańß mańßanaaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw so~uwa…ĺ no~u mama fo~u~uja na i ko~ujo~u a nijaro~u a tam…¨~…ģaw o~u nikafana ° no~u paŇč ¶ańß/amis to~u tafo~uko~u…¨~…ģ ato~u no~u …ĺ…ôkakawa a pifo~utiŇč: fa ¶o~u no~u masapaŇč ¶ańßaj/masaamisaj, fana ° no~u s…ôras…ôrajan, ato~u no~u …ĺ…ôkakawa a pa…ĺa saka ¶…ô ¶aj: siwkaj itini i no~u tajwan a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, o~u paŇč ¶ańß/ amis ko~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan no~u rijar, ka ¶iŇčaŇčanan i matasimaj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ, misa °a…ĺiŇčajaj no~u ina ato~u saka ¶ifana ° to~u rijar ato~u tarawa…¨~…ģaw. itini to~u i pasawa…ĺi …ĺa…ôno~u no~u …ĺo~uto~uk mi…ĺi…ĺisaj to~u rijar ato~u i satimo~u…ĺan no~u tajawan ato~u i masa…¨~…ģaf…¨~…ģaf no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u ato~u po~uso~uŇč ko~u masapaŇč ¶ańßaj/masaamisaj, mikirijar ato~u mikitarawa…¨~…ģaw a ma °o~urip, mat…ôn…ôt…ôn…ôsaj a miso~up…ô…¨~…ģ to~u fana ° no~u …ĺ…ôno~u Ē ato~u k…ôrańß, ato~u rakat no~u fo~utiŇč. o~u tatapaŇčan a sapifo~utiŇč no~u kapańß ko~u tafo~uko~u…¨~…ģ, o~u nipifo~u…ĺ…ôsak ato~u nipiso~u…ĺim…ôt to~una tafo~uko~u…¨~…ģ i, o~u pipato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčan to~u nikapa…ĺa…¨~…ģa ° to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč no~u nijaro~u ° ato~u nikarik…ô ¶ no~u finaw…ĺan. o~u …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u pifo~utiŇč no~u paŇč ¶ańß/amis i, mata…ô °…ô…ĺifaj to~u saka °o~urip no~u finaw…ĺan, ma ¶akat ko~u pipa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~uan to~u …ĺ…ôkakawa, tataja…ĺan no~u kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan ato~u sakati °…ôr to~u kawas. o~u tatapaŇčan no~unini a pika…¨~…ģka…¨~…ģ i, pakajni i tataja…ĺan no~u nijaro~u ° ato~u masasipa…¨~…ģaŇč no~u finaw…ĺan a mipańßapinaŇč to~u …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u pifo~utiŇč, to~u °inajan a kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ ko~u mik…ôri…¨~…ģaj to~u tataja…ĺan no~u kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan. o~u kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ no~u nijaro~u ° i, misasa °…ôr to~u fa °inajan nani pakaro~uŇčaj taŇčasa i ka…ĺas a misasi…ĺsi…ĺ. o~u mataja…ĺaj to~u tataja…ĺan i °ajawaj ko~u kapańß, o~u mama ¶akataj ko~u ma °ik…ôsaj a kapańß to~u mama no~u kapańß ato~u ¶iŇčaŇčanaj a ka…ĺas, mata °…ô…ĺiaj to~u pinapina a mińß…ô ¶aan i, ta misas…ô…ĺa…ĺ to~u, saka masarik…ô ¶aj ko~u kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ. sapipa °o~uripaw ato~u sapipasimawaw ko~u masapŇč ¶ańß/masaamisaj to~u nijaro~u °, mapatir…ôŇč ko~u saka ¶irik…ô ¶ no~u kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ, masasik…ôtaj to~u misa °a…ĺiŇčajaj no~u ina a …ĺ…ôkakawa, saka masato~usaaj ko~u …ĺa…ĺan no~u …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u masapaŇč ¶ańß/masaamisaj. o~u matiniaj a …ĺ…ôkakawa °i, o~u sapipa…ĺa…ĺ…ôn to~u ¶i °i ¶…ô…ĺaj a fafańßijan i misa °a…ĺiŇčajaj no~u ina a …ĺ…ôkakawa, o~u sapipa ¶akat to~u fa °inajan pakajni i pi °…ôm…ôt to~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u nijaro~u °, ta mapatir…ôŇč ko~u tata °aŇčaj a ŇčaŇčan. saka i tarawa…¨~…ģaw ato~u rija…ĺ a mifo~utiŇč ko~u tafo~uko~u…¨~…ģ, mipato~um…ô ¶…ôkan to~u tataja…ĺan no~u kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan no~u fa °inajan ato~u …ĺ…ôkakawa. ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč a mipo~u…ĺita to~u rakat no~u nano~um ato~u kaitiraan no~u fo~utifo~utiŇčan, o~u matiniaj a tan…ôŇč i, sańß…ôto~u o~u i tatińßi no~u mato~u °asaj a minanam to~u pinapina a mińß…ô ¶aan, ta maa…ĺa ko~u matiniaj a tan…ôŇč, saka o~u kananaman no~u mitafo~uko~u…¨~…ģ i, to~u pipańßapinaŇč to~u ¶iŇčaŇčan ato~u nikafana ° no~u fa °inajan i nijaro~u °. sakato~u…ĺo~u: o~u …ĺa…ĺo~usi…¨~…ģan no~u …ĺ…ôkakawa ato~u fana ° to~u sapisaŇča ° ko~u kasasiik…ôik…ô…¨~…ģ no~u fafańßijan ato~u fa °inajan o~u …ĺa…ĺo~usi…¨~…ģan no~u …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u masapaŇč ¶ańß/masaamisaj i, mi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u to~u …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u fafańßijan ato~u fa °inajan, saka ¶aaj kasawa…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u nijaro~u ° ato~u sapatan…ôt…ôk to~u rik…ô ¶ no~u nijaro~u. o~u misako~ur…ôŇč ato~u misa…ĺo~usi…¨~…ģ(o~u t…ôk…ô…¨~…ģ no~u fafańßijan): o~u fafańßijan ko~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj a misako~ur…ôŇč, misaŇča ° to~u sapitaŇčtaŇč ato~u sapisa…ĺisin a kasasiro~umaro~uma a …ĺa…ĺo~usi…¨~…ģan. o~u misato~urik ato~u sapir…ôp…ôt to~u fo~utiŇč( o~u t…ôk…ô…¨~…ģ no~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj a fa °injan): ta…¨~…ģamaanaj ko~u fana ° to~u misatirik to~u …ĺa…ĺo~usi…¨~…ģan, sańß…ôto~u o~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj ko~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj, misaŇča ° to~u fakar, rakar ato~u masamaamaanaj a sapir…ôp…ôt to~u fo~utiŇč. o~uni a kasasiik…ô…¨~…ģ no~u tataja…ĺan i, masapa…¨~…ģapa…¨~…ģaŇčaj ko~u kapańß a mifo~u…ĺ…ôsak to~u tafo~uko~u…¨~…ģ i °ajaw ato~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj a misaŇča ° to~u sapir…ôp…ôt to~u fo~utiŇč i iko~u…ĺ, saka ma…ĺit…ôŇč to~u ko~u tir…ôŇč no~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj i, pa…¨~…ģo~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u ńßo~u o~u tatapaŇčan no~u mipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģaj to~u taja…ĺ. o~u nika…ĺaritiŇč no~u …ĺisin to~u misa…ĺo~uma ° ato~u pifo~urtiŇč: ira ko~u mata…ĺo~u…ĺo~uŇčaj a ka…ĺa…ĺiti…ĺitiŇčan no~u …ĺisin i misa…ĺo~uma ° i pa…ĺa ato~u pifo~utim* i °a…ĺo~u. tinako~u sa, o~u …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u to~u °as i, ma…ĺ…ôpo~un to~u ko~u pafafo~ujan i tińßi no~u …ĺo~uma ° i, ¶aka…ô ¶a tajra i °a…ĺo~u a mifo~utiŇč ko~u fa °inajan, o~u sapisa…ĺisin a mipak…ô…ĺaŇč to~u nika…ĺ…ôpo~unan. o~u matiniaj a …ĺ…ôkakawa i, ¶…ôk to~u °i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ. ¶aaj pa ¶…ôfa a mik…ôto~un to~u …ĺisin a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, o~u mito~uo~uraj to~u pa…ĺapatan, tinako~u sa , itini i saka…ĺima a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ira ko~u faki ¶i, ¶…ô…ĺaj a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ ato~u paka…ĺo~uŇčaj a pakańß…ôm…ôk. o~uni a pisa…ĺi…ĺam to~u kinaira i, mipa…ĺafaŇč ¶a…ĺ to~u nika…ĺa…ĺitiŇč no~u kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ, saka ma…ĺa ta…¨~…ģami ¶i…¨~…ģ…ôkaj a …ĺisin ko~u misa ¶…ôpo~u ° no~u paŇč ¶ańß/amis. o~u pipa…ĺa…¨~…ģa ° no~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj i, o~u sapipańß…ômak ato~u sapipaini a so~uwa…ĺ, saka ¶aaj ko~u nika…ĺaan to~u fo~utiŇč a ¶a ko~u nipaf…ô…ĺian, o~u pakańß…ôm…ôk a fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, saka pakao~u…ĺańß to~u nikaro~ut…ôŇčan a s…ô…ĺa…ĺ a parajraj. saiko~u…ĺaj o~u …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u pifo~utiŇč no~u paŇč ¶ańß/amis to~u tafo~uko~u…¨~…ģ i, o~u masasifo~u…¨~…ģaj a nikararitiŇč no~u finawa…ĺan ato~u s…ôras…ôrajan. pakajni i tarawa…¨~…ģaw ato~u rija…ĺ ato~u i pa…ĺa a mi…¨~…ģat…ôŇč a fana ° i, mapatir…ôŇč no~u paŇč ¶ańß/amis ko~u t…ôk…ô…¨~…ģ to~u kaka…ôn…ôn. itini i pikin…ôŇčn…ôŇč no~u aniniaj, mika…¨~…ģak…¨~…ģ to~u ka…ĺim…ô…ĺaan a fana ° no~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj to~u pifo~utiŇč, pakajni i pi ¶o~uk…ôr to~u s…ôraŇčawa ato~u pa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u a pi…¨~…ģipo~ut to~u s…ôras…ôrajan i, ma °…ômin ira ko~u sata…¨~…ģamaanaj a °…ôpo~u ¶ no~u pikiŇčkiw ato~u pipa…¨~…ģ…ômak. saka o~u nikafana ° no~u paŇč ¶ańß/amis to~u tafo~uko~u…¨~…ģ i, ¶aaj ko~u tan…ôŇč a ¶a no~u pifo~utiŇč, o~u nika…ĺa…ĺitiŇč to~u finaw…ĺan ato~u s…ôras…ôrajan a mipatir…ôŇč to~u masasipa…¨~…ģaŇč a pinaŇčan. o~uni a ńßarat…ôŇč i, o~u ta…¨~…ģaka…ĺim…ô…ĺaaj a ńßarat…ôŇč.
